title: 4. Points for Crow's Feet and Lip Lines

MUSCLES RELATED TO
CROW'S FEET AND LIP LINES
There are three orbicularis muscles on the
face. They are the landmarks of facial muscles.
Two  are  around  the  eyes,  and  the  other  is
around  the  mouth.   The  function  is  quite
straight-forward. These muscles surround the
eyes  and  mouth,  which  are  round  shaped
holes. When these muscles contract, the holes
get smaller. These movements like squinting
makes many small wrinkles.
The  contraction  of  the  orbicularis  oris
makes the smoker's lines, and the orbicularis
oculi’s contraction makes the crow's feet.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
Crow’s feet
Crow’s feet are related to facial expression and loss of fat pad by aging. Therefore,
increasing the circulation around the whole eye socket is a
key of treatment. Also, needling on the site of wrinkles
helps reduce the wrinkle formation.
